TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_hunting_taboos_Angai
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: makasin ia eh iku masin ia teku poisua aracakan.
S.PHON: makasin ia eh iku masin ia teku poisua ar~ɾaʦakan.
S.FORM: makasin ia eh iku masin ia teku poisua aracakan.
S.PHON: makasin ia eh iku masin ia teku poisua ar~ɾaʦakan.
S.TRANSL: 現在呢,我現在要說關於狩獵的事.
Now, I am going to talk about hunting.

S.FORM: miana mamarurang nuu aracakan ia uaca muacapa m uh mocan musa rʉmʉra aririan sua uh sisin.
S.PHON: miana mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ nuu ar~ɾaʦakan ia uaʦa muaʦapa m uh moʦan musa r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa ar~ɾir~ɾian sua uh sisin.
S.FORM: miana mamarurang nuu aracakan ia uaca muacapa m uh mocan musa rʉmʉra aririan sua uh sisin.
S.PHON: miana mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ nuu ar~ɾaʦakan ia uaʦa muaʦapa m uh moʦan musa r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa ar~ɾir~ɾian sua uh sisin.
S.TRANSL: 過去年長者若要狩獵,會先趕去叢林,側聽畫眉鳥的聲音.
In the past, if the elders go hunting, they would rush to the forest first, and eavesdrop on the sound made by the Melodious Laughingthrush.

W.TRANSL: Ca重疊-年長者-Ca重疊-年長者

S.FORM: nuu mamanʉngin a nuu mamanʉngin a sisin ia muaca nukai mamanʉng ia pu'i pu'ipa tanasa.
S.PHON: nuu mamanɨŋin a nuu mamanɨŋin a sisin ia muaʦa nukai mamanɨŋ ia puʔi puʔipa tanasa.
S.FORM: nuu mamanʉngin a nuu mamanʉngin a sisin ia muaca nukai mamanʉng ia pu'i pu'ipa tanasa.
S.PHON: nuu mamanɨŋin a nuu mamanɨŋin a sisin ia muaʦa nukai mamanɨŋ ia puʔi puʔipa tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 如果畫眉鳥的聲音好的話,就走,如果不好的話,就先返回.
If the sound of the Melodious Laughing thrushes is good, they would proceed; if the sound is not good, they would return to their houses first.

S.FORM: uh taniara s nuu karanana taniara muaca nuu mamanʉngin ia mo muacacu.
S.PHON: uh taniar~ɾa s nuu kar~ɾanana taniar~ɾa muaʦa nuu mamanɨŋin ia mo muaʦaʦu.
S.FORM: uh taniara s nuu karanana taniara muaca nuu mamanʉngin ia mo muacacu.
S.PHON: uh taniar~ɾa s nuu kar~ɾanana taniar~ɾa muaʦa nuu mamanɨŋin ia mo muaʦaʦu.
S.TRANSL: 如果不同的日子去,如果聲音好的話,就去了.
If they go on a different day, and if the sound is good, they would then proceed to hunt.

S.FORM: mokusa sia tu tu'unain eh uh tia tu'unain aracakan tia tu'unain katataruan.
S.PHON: mokusa sia tu tuʔunain eh uh tia tuʔunain ar~ɾaʦakan tia tuʔunain katatar~ɾuan.
S.FORM: mokusa sia tu tu'unain eh uh tia tu'unain aracakan tia tu'unain katataruan.
S.PHON: mokusa sia tu tuʔunain eh uh tia tuʔunain ar~ɾaʦakan tia tuʔunain katatar~ɾuan.
S.TRANSL: 要到它狩獵的地方,在它的位置製作工寮.

TRANSL.notes: (The hunter) will go to its place where he hunts to build a shed.

S.TRANSL: will go to its place where he hunts to build a shed.

S.FORM: nuu mosaci nia mosacu nia katataruan uN kamanʉng sua tia sirupain rʉmʉnge tarʉ tarʉ ringee.
S.PHON: nuu mosaʦi nia mosaʦu nia katatar~ɾuan un kamanɨŋ sua tia sir~ɾupain r~ɾɨmɨŋe tar~ɾɨ tar~ɾɨ r~ɾiŋee.
S.FORM: nuu mosaci nia mosacu nia katataruan uN kamanʉng sua tia sirupain rʉmʉnge tarʉ tarʉ ringee.
S.PHON: nuu mosaʦi nia mosaʦu nia katatar~ɾuan un kamanɨŋ sua tia sir~ɾupain r~ɾɨmɨŋe tar~ɾɨ tar~ɾɨ r~ɾiŋee.
S.TRANSL: 去那裏建造獵寮,製作要使用的陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: (The hunter) would go there to build a shed, and make cushion traps that are going to be used.

S.TRANSL: would go there to build a shed, and make cushion traps that are going to be used.

S.FORM: masin masici ia nuu n nura ia muacacu rumingee.
S.PHON: masin masiʦi ia nuu n nur~ɾa ia muaʦaʦu r~ɾumiŋee.
S.FORM: masin masici ia nuu n nura ia muacacu rumingee.
S.PHON: masin masiʦi ia nuu n nur~ɾa ia muaʦaʦu r~ɾumiŋee.
S.TRANSL: 明天的時候,就走去放陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: On the next day, (they) would then go and set up traps.

S.TRANSL: On the next day, would then go and set up traps.

S.FORM: rumingeeen nuu mocacan rumingee cʉmʉ'ʉra sua ramang marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: r~ɾumiŋeeen nuu moʦaʦan r~ɾumiŋee ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua r~ɾamaŋ mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.FORM: rumingeeen nuu mocacan rumingee cʉmʉ'ʉra sua ramang marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: r~ɾumiŋeeen nuu moʦaʦan r~ɾumiŋee ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua r~ɾamaŋ mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.TRANSL: 如果去放陷阱,就會觀察野獸所留下的足跡.
If they go to set up a trap, they would observe tracks left by animals.

S.FORM: nuu cʉmʉreen sua ramang vavuru ia kamanʉng kee m sua ringee vavuru.
S.PHON: nuu ʦɨmɨr~ɾeen sua r~ɾamaŋ vavur~ɾu ia kamanɨŋ kee m sua r~ɾiŋee vavur~ɾu.
S.FORM: nuu cʉmʉreen sua ramang vavuru ia kamanʉng kee m sua ringee vavuru.
S.PHON: nuu ʦɨmɨr~ɾeen sua r~ɾamaŋ vavur~ɾu ia kamanɨŋ kee m sua r~ɾiŋee vavur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 若看到山豬的足跡,就製作山豬的陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: If (the hunter) sees tracks left by boars, he/she would make a boar trap.

S.TRANSL: If sees tracks left by boars, he/she would make a boar trap.

S.FORM: cʉmʉreen nen ramang to'orung ia humar kamanʉng kee ringee to'orung.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨr~ɾeen nen r~ɾamaŋ toʔor~ɾuŋ ia humar~ɾ kamanɨŋ kee r~ɾiŋee toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.FORM: cʉmʉreen nen ramang to'orung ia humar kamanʉng kee ringee to'orung.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨr~ɾeen nen r~ɾamaŋ toʔor~ɾuŋ ia humar~ɾ kamanɨŋ kee r~ɾiŋee toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 若看到山羌的足跡,就製作山羌的陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: If (the hunter) sees tracks left by the barking deer, he/she would make a barking deer trap.

S.TRANSL: If sees tracks left by the barking deer, he/she would make a barking deer trap.

S.FORM: uh masuacu nuu nimuringeeci ia muacacu mosa te ta tʉtʉnʉvu taru'anni.
S.PHON: uh masuaʦu nuu nimur~ɾiŋeeʦi ia muaʦaʦu mosa te ta tɨtɨnɨvu tar~ɾuʔanni.
S.FORM: uh masuacu nuu nimuringeeci ia muacacu mosa te ta tʉtʉnʉvu taru'anni.
S.PHON: uh masuaʦu nuu nimur~ɾiŋeeʦi ia muaʦaʦu mosa te ta tɨtɨnɨvu tar~ɾuʔanni.
S.TRANSL: 如果那樣做好了,已經放好陷阱了,就趕去他們的獵寮.
If things have been done like that, and they have set up the traps, they would then rush to go to their hunting sheds.

S.FORM: eh nukai motaru'an nia ia muaca mu mutanasʉ mutanasʉ.
S.PHON: eh nukai motar~ɾuʔan nia ia muaʦa mu mutanasɨ mutanasɨ.
S.FORM: eh nukai motaru'an nia ia muaca mu mutanasʉ mutanasʉ.
S.PHON: eh nukai motar~ɾuʔan nia ia muaʦa mu mutanasɨ mutanasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 如果不在獵寮過夜,就回家.
If they are not staying overnight in the sheds, they would go back to their houses.

S.FORM: nuu kat mutan usʉpatʉ taniarahara sa urima taniara ia musaci nia musaci nia sʉmʉrʉcʉ sʉmʉrʉcʉ a sua uh ringee.
S.PHON: nuu kat mutan usɨpatɨ taniar~ɾahar~ɾa sa ur~ɾima taniar~ɾa ia musaʦi nia musaʦi nia sɨmɨr~ɾɨʦɨ sɨmɨr~ɾɨʦɨ a sua uh r~ɾiŋee.
S.FORM: nuu kat mutan usʉpatʉ taniarahara sa urima taniara ia musaci nia musaci nia sʉmʉrʉcʉ sʉmʉrʉcʉ a sua uh ringee.
S.PHON: nuu kat mutan usɨpatɨ taniar~ɾahar~ɾa sa ur~ɾima taniar~ɾa ia musaʦi nia musaʦi nia sɨmɨr~ɾɨʦɨ sɨmɨr~ɾɨʦɨ a sua uh r~ɾiŋee.
S.TRANSL: 四天或五天的時候,就去了那裏,探查陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: When four or five days have passed, (the hunter) would go there and check the traps.

S.TRANSL: When four or five days have passed, would go there and check the traps.

S.FORM: nuu mamanʉngin ʉcʉpin ia una h hu poringee vavuru.
S.PHON: nuu mamanɨŋin ɨʦɨpin ia una h hu por~ɾiŋee vavur~ɾu.
S.FORM: nuu mamanʉngin ʉcʉpin ia una h hu poringee vavuru.
S.PHON: nuu mamanɨŋin ɨʦɨpin ia una h hu por~ɾiŋee vavur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 如果夢很好的話,就有陷阱中到山豬.

TRANSL.notes: If (he/she) dreamed of something good, there will be traps successfully catching some boars.

S.TRANSL: If dreamed of something good, there will be traps successfully catching some boars.

S.FORM: vavurukara ha to to'orung.
S.PHON: vavur~ɾukar~ɾa ha to toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.FORM: vavurukara ha to to'orung.
S.PHON: vavur~ɾukar~ɾa ha to toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 是山豬呢,還是山羌?
Is it boars that are caught, or is it barking deers?

S.FORM: ah miana nuu masuin ia macancangarUkia.
S.PHON: ah miana nuu masuin ia maʦanʦaŋar~ɾukia.
S.FORM: ah miana nuu masuin ia macancangarUkia.
S.PHON: ah miana nuu masuin ia maʦanʦaŋar~ɾukia.
S.TRANSL: 以前,如果那樣的話,我就很高興.
In the past, if something like that happens, I would be very pleased.

S.FORM: pu'i pu'i tanaha nuu nipuringeekia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: puʔi puʔi tanaha nuu nipur~ɾiŋeekia mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.FORM: pu'i pu'i tanaha nuu nipuringeekia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: puʔi puʔi tanaha nuu nipur~ɾiŋeekia mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.TRANSL: 如果陷阱有中野獸,我就回家.
I would go home if I caught some beasts with the traps.

S.FORM: museci tanasa ia macangcangarʉ sua uh ta kat tanam nannakʉ tanasa sii m nipuringeekia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: museʦi tanasa ia maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ sua uh ta kat tanam nannakɨ tanasa sii m nipur~ɾiŋeekia mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.FORM: museci tanasa ia macangcangarʉ sua uh ta kat tanam nannakʉ tanasa sii m nipuringeekia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.PHON: museʦi tanasa ia maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ sua uh ta kat tanam nannakɨ tanasa sii m nipur~ɾiŋeekia mar~ɾɨkur~ɾakur~ɾapɨ.
S.TRANSL: 回到家了,家裡的女人們就很高興,因為我有中到野獸.

TRANSL.notes: After (my) coming home, the women in the house would be happy, because I had caught some beasts with the traps.

S.TRANSL: After coming home, the women in the house would be happy, because I had caught some beasts with the traps.

S.FORM: nuu masuin ia 'una cau iovutu tana uh rovʉvʉ ru uh tia cuma cʉmʉra masuin ia tecikia mosa nia putu putukava ha nipuringara vavurukara ha to'orung.
S.PHON: nuu masuin ia ʔuna ʦau iovutu tana uh r~ɾovɨvɨ r~ɾu uh tia ʦuma ʦɨmɨr~ɾa masuin ia teʦikia mosa nia putu putukava ha nipur~ɾiŋar~ɾa vavur~ɾukar~ɾa ha toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.FORM: nuu masuin ia 'una cau iovutu tana uh rovʉvʉ ru uh tia cuma cʉmʉra masuin ia tecikia mosa nia putu putukava ha nipuringara vavurukara ha to'orung.
S.PHON: nuu masuin ia ʔuna ʦau iovutu tana uh r~ɾovɨvɨ r~ɾu uh tia ʦuma ʦɨmɨr~ɾa masuin ia teʦikia mosa nia putu putukava ha nipur~ɾiŋar~ɾa vavur~ɾukar~ɾa ha toʔor~ɾuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 如果那樣的話,我就要把中到的野獸剝皮,看是山豬呢,還是山羌.
If something like that happens, I will skin what I have caught with the traps, depending on whether it is a boar or a barking deer.

S.FORM: masuacu mun na nia iovutu cau matacuvucuvung cʉmʉ'ʉra sua nipuringara.
S.PHON: masuaʦu mun na nia iovutu ʦau mataʦuvuʦuvuŋ ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua nipur~ɾiŋar~ɾa.
S.FORM: masuacu mun na nia iovutu cau matacuvucuvung cʉmʉ'ʉra sua nipuringara.
S.PHON: masuaʦu mun na nia iovutu ʦau mataʦuvuʦuvuŋ ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa sua nipur~ɾiŋar~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 那樣了之後,就有人來,聚集在一起看中到的獵物.
After that, there will be people coming over, gathering to see what has been caught by the traps.

S.FORM: putukava putukavacikia ka'ara'aram po'ocipi sua uh 'aram sovungun sovungun cau niivatu.
S.PHON: putukava putukavaʦikia kaʔar~ɾaʔar~ɾam poʔoʦipi sua uh ʔar~ɾam sovuŋun sovuŋun ʦau niivatu.
S.FORM: putukava putukavacikia ka'ara'aram po'ocipi sua uh 'aram sovungun sovungun cau niivatu.
S.PHON: putukava putukavaʦikia kaʔar~ɾaʔar~ɾam poʔoʦipi sua uh ʔar~ɾam sovuŋun sovuŋun ʦau niivatu.
S.TRANSL: 我將野獸剝皮,做成肉塊,煮肉,分給來的人.
I would skin the beast, cut it into meat chunks, cook them, and hand it out to the people who came.

S.FORM: uh makasuaci ia uh macangcangarʉ sua cau niivatu rovʉvʉ.
S.PHON: uh makasuaʦi ia uh maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ sua ʦau niivatu r~ɾovɨvɨ.
S.FORM: uh makasuaci ia uh macangcangarʉ sua cau niivatu rovʉvʉ.
S.PHON: uh makasuaʦi ia uh maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ sua ʦau niivatu r~ɾovɨvɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那樣的話,來坐坐的人都很高興.
If something like that happens, the people who came to visit would be very pleased.
